_comment: Benchmark shortlist. Optimized for tool-calling first, reasoning second, fits the 5080 (16GB) at Q4 except where noted. configs: which GPU layouts to evaluate. gguf paths are resolved under ../models/ (see download.sh). 'single' = --device Vulkan1 (5080). 'dual' = --device Vulkan1,Vulkan2 --split-mode layer --tensor-split 16,16 (pooled, ~32GB).

models.name: qwen2.5-7b
models.note: snappy baseline; Qwen2.5 has strong native tool use

models.name: mistral-small-24b
models.note: tight on one 16GB card; strong agentic

models.name: qwen2.5-32b
models.note: dual-only: neither 16GB card fits it alone — the pooling payoff test

models.name: qwen3-14b
models.note: matches the LIVE deployed brain (Ollama qwen3:14b). The true baseline to measure VL candidates against. /no_think keeps the JSON contract from being eaten by a reasoning block.

models.name: qwen2.5-vl-7b
models.note: multimodal; serve LM-only for the text-regression A/B vs qwen2.5-7b (isolates the vision tax). mmproj = vision pass.

models.name: gemma3-12b
models.note: native-multimodal at ~current-brain size; the 'multimodal at size' candidate vs qwen3:14b
